extract: Giga Impact (Japanese: ギガインパクト Giga Impact) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM68 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM09 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM152 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM055 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be upgraded to the special Z-Move, Pulverizing Pancake, by Snorlax holding Snorlium Z.
